title: Reanaliza publicznych danych WES SRR4088561 w kierunku wariantu RAG1 związanego z SCID
description: Educational-diagnostic Galaxy WES reanalysis of public SRA run SRR4088561, focused on SCID-associated genes and the RAG1 c.2308G>A, p.E770K / p.Glu770Lys variant. The deposit contains quality-control outputs, annotation summaries, filtered SCID-panel tables, RAG1 variant annotation files, depth checks and workflow documentation. This is not a clinically validated diagnostic report.
notes: Low local coverage at RAG1 p.E770K (DP=2) limits diagnostic confidence. The analysis is for educational/portfolio use.
